title: notifications-mail — entitlements
description: Metered mail send caps + attachment caps. Aggregated by notifications core into the top-level `notifications.mail.month` entitlement.

entitlements.description: Monthly outbound mail sends per workspace. Reset at UTC month boundary. Aggregated view lives in notifications core.
Max total attachment size per email (256KB / 5MB / 25MB). Providers cap at ~25MB typically.
Whether attachments are allowed at all. Free plan gates them out.
Enterprise workspaces may configure their own SMTP endpoint via settings.
Sends from a dedicated IP (SendGrid / SES). Enterprise add-on.
